english: to clean / to cleanse / to purify
notes: 'gereinigt' is the past participle of 'reinigen'. It can also be used as an adjective meaning 'cleaned/cleansed'.

sentences.german: Sie reinigt das Badezimmer jeden Samstag.
sentences.english: She cleans the bathroom every Saturday.

sentences.german: Er hat seinen Mantel in der Reinigung gereinigt.
sentences.english: He had his coat cleaned at the dry cleaner's.

sentences.german: Das Wasser wird von Schadstoffen gereinigt.
sentences.english: The water is purified of pollutants.
